mapper.select: SELECT id, epg_source_id, channel_id, channel_name, start_time, stop_time, title, sub_title, description, categories, icons, credits, ratings, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM epg_programs WHERE epg_source_id = #{sourceId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY channel_name, start_time

SELECT id, epg_source_id, channel_id, channel_name, start_time, stop_time, title, sub_title, description, categories, icons, credits, ratings, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM epg_programs WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, epg_source_id, channel_id, channel_name, start_time, stop_time, title, sub_title, description, categories, icons, credits, ratings, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM epg_programs WHERE epg_source_id = #{sourceId} AND channel_name = #{channelName} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_time
SELECT channel_name as channelName, COUNT(*) as programCount FROM epg_programs WHERE epg_source_id = #{sourceId} AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY channel_name ORDER BY channel_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO epg_programs ( epg_source_id, channel_id, channel_name, start_time, stop_time, title, sub_title, description, categories, icons, credits, ratings, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{epgSourceId}, #{channelId}, #{channelName}, #{startTime}, #{stopTime}, #{title}, #{subTitle}, #{description}, #{categories}, #{icons}, #{credits}, #{ratings}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0 )

INSERT INTO epg_programs ( epg_source_id, channel_id, channel_name, start_time, stop_time, title, sub_title, description, categories, icons, credits, ratings, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
(#{program.epgSourceId}, #{program.channelId}, #{program.channelName}, #{program.startTime}, #{program.stopTime}, #{program.title}, #{program.subTitle}, #{program.description}, #{program.categories}, #{program.icons}, #{program.credits}, #{program.ratings}, #{program.createdAt}, #{program.updatedAt}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE epg_programs SET channel_id = #{channelId}, channel_name = #{channelName}, start_time = #{startTime}, stop_time = #{stopTime}, title = #{title}, sub_title = #{subTitle}, description = #{description}, categories = #{categories}, icons = #{icons}, credits = #{credits}, ratings = #{ratings}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
